mapper.select: SELECT ht.schema_name, ht.table_name, ht.avg_table_size as value, ht.status FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY ht.avg_table_size DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT ht.schema_name, ht.table_name, (ht.total_seq_scan + ht.total_idx_scan) as value, ht.status FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY (ht.total_seq_scan + ht.total_idx_scan) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT ht.schema_name, ht.table_name, ht.avg_bloat_percent as value, ht.status FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY ht.avg_bloat_percent DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', ht.collected_at) as timestamp, SUM(ht.total_seq_scan) as seq_scan, SUM(ht.total_idx_scan) as idx_scan, SUM(ht.total_tup_ins) as n_tup_ins, SUM(ht.total_tup_upd) as n_tup_upd, SUM(ht.total_tup_del) as n_tup_del FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', ht.collected_at) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT ht.table_name, ht.avg_bloat_percent as bloat_percent FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY ht.avg_bloat_percent DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT ht.table_name, ht.vacuum_delay_seconds FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY ht.vacuum_delay_seconds DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) as total_tables, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN ht.status = '정상' THEN 1 END), 0) as active_tables, COALESCE(AVG(ht.avg_cache_hit_ratio), 0) as avg_cache_hit_ratio, COALESCE(SUM(ht.total_seq_scan), 0) as total_seq_scans, COALESCE(SUM(ht.total_idx_scan), 0) as total_idx_scans, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN ht.avg_bloat_percent >= 15 THEN 1 END), 0) as high_bloat_tables FROM hot_table_agg ht INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON ht.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND ht.database_id = #{databaseId} AND ht.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} )
SELECT database_id, instance_id, database_name, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM monitor_database WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY instance_id, database_id

SELECT hot_table_raw_id, database_id, collected_at, schema_name, table_name, table_size, seq_scan, seq_tup_read, idx_scan, idx_tup_fetch, n_tup_ins, n_tup_upd, n_tup_del, n_live_tup, n_dead_tup, heap_blks_read, heap_blks_hit, last_vacuum, last_autovacuum, created_at, n_tup_hot_upd, bloat_percent FROM hot_table_raw WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND schema_name = #{schemaName} AND table_name = #{tableName} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hot_table_raw ( database_id, collected_at, schema_name, table_name, table_size, seq_scan, seq_tup_read, idx_scan, idx_tup_fetch, n_tup_ins, n_tup_upd, n_tup_del, n_live_tup, n_dead_tup, heap_blks_read, heap_blks_hit, last_vacuum, last_autovacuum, n_tup_hot_upd, bloat_percent, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.databaseId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.schemaName}, #{item.tableName}, #{item.tableSize}, #{item.seqScan}, #{item.seqTupRead}, #{item.idxScan}, #{item.idxTupFetch}, #{item.nTupIns}, #{item.nTupUpd}, #{item.nTupDel}, #{item.nLiveTup}, #{item.nDeadTup}, #{item.heapBlksRead}, #{item.heapBlksHit}, #{item.lastVacuum}, #{item.lastAutovacuum}, #{item.nTupHotUpd}, #{item.bloatPercent}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO hot_table_agg ( database_id, collected_at, schema_name, table_name, avg_table_size, total_seq_scan, total_seq_tup_read, total_idx_scan, total_idx_tup_fetch, total_tup_ins, total_tup_upd, total_tup_del, avg_dead_ratio, avg_cache_hit_ratio, avg_seq_scan_ratio, vacuum_delay_seconds, status, total_tup_hot_upd, avg_bloat_percent, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.databaseId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.schemaName}, #{item.tableName}, #{item.avgTableSize}, #{item.totalSeqScan}, #{item.totalSeqTupRead}, #{item.totalIdxScan}, #{item.totalIdxTupFetch}, #{item.totalTupIns}, #{item.totalTupUpd}, #{item.totalTupDel}, #{item.avgDeadRatio}, #{item.avgCacheHitRatio}, #{item.avgSeqScanRatio}, #{item.vacuumDelaySeconds}, #{item.status}, #{item.totalTupHotUpd}, #{item.avgBloatPercent}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT ps.schemaname, ps.relname AS tablename, COALESCE( (SELECT pg_total_relation_size(c.oid) FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid WHERE n.nspname = ps.schemaname AND c.relname = ps.relname LIMIT 1), 0 ) AS table_size, ps.seq_scan, ps.seq_tup_read, ps.idx_scan, ps.idx_tup_fetch, ps.n_tup_ins, ps.n_tup_upd, ps.n_tup_del, ps.n_tup_hot_upd, ps.n_live_tup, ps.n_dead_tup, sio.heap_blks_read, sio.heap_blks_hit, ps.last_vacuum, ps.last_autovacuum FROM pg_stat_user_tables ps LEFT JOIN pg_statio_user_tables sio ON ps.relid = sio.relid WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid WHERE n.nspname = ps.schemaname AND c.relname = ps.relname ) ORDER BY (ps.seq_scan + COALESCE(ps.idx_scan, 0)) DESC LIMIT 20
